creative_direction.concept: Every bag of coffee is a compressed journey from a specific hillside to your cup — the site makes that altitude, terroir, and human chain viscerally felt.
creative_direction.narrative: The visitor lands on darkness broken only by steam curling off a single pour — no text, just atmosphere. Scrolling down reveals the origin map: exact farm coordinates, elevation, harvest date. The middle act introduces the roasters by name, with their hand-annotated tasting notes. The site closes on the subscription CTA framed not as a product but as 'a standing order from the mountain.'
creative_direction.emotional_tone: The quiet pride of someone who has found exactly the thing they were looking for.
creative_direction.signature_moment: On the origin section, hovering a farm pin on the map triggers a 3-second ambient field recording from that specific farm (birds, wind, distant machinery) while the elevation number counts up in large type — making the geography audible.
creative_direction.brand_personality: A seasoned Q-grader who speaks in exact descriptors ('dried apricot, brown butter, 72% cacao') rather than superlatives. Would never say 'artisanal' or 'passionate'. Comfortable with silence. Wears an apron with burn marks.

components.name: FarmPin
components.description: SVG map marker that pulses on hover, triggers audio playback and a slide-in FarmPanel. Active state shows elevation label in Canela display size.

components.name: FarmPanel
components.description: Slide-in right-side drawer showing farmer portrait (greyscale), farm name, country, altitude in masl, processing method badge, and harvest month range.

components.name: RoasterCard
components.description: Portrait photo in a ragged-edge mask, name in Canela h3, handwriting-style SVG of a tasting note overlaid at 40° rotation.

components.name: CoffeeCard
components.description: Product card with origin flag, process badge (washed/natural/honey), flavour wheel fragment, price, and two CTAs: 'Buy once' and 'Add to standing order'.

components.name: ElevationCounter
components.description: Large Canela display-size number that counts up from 0 to the farm's actual masl value over 2.4s when the farm pin is activated.

components.name: AmbientAudioPlayer
components.description: Invisible audio element, auto-plays on farm pin hover, fades out after 3s or on mouseout. No visible controls — sound is the surprise.

components.name: SectionDotNav
components.description: Vertical stack of 6 dots on the right edge, active dot fills with Blonde Roast accent colour. Clicks scroll to the corresponding section.

components.name: SubscriptionToggle
components.description: Segmented control: 'Single bag' / 'Standing order'. Selecting standing order exposes frequency selector (2-weekly / 4-weekly) and shows a small price-per-bag saving.
